news.title: News
news.fetchTriggered: Fetch started — refresh in a moment.
news.selectArticle: Pick an article from the list.
news.tabHtmlMissing: No raw HTML for this article.
news.captureKeepHint: Save a short LLM digest under Raw/Feeds/Notes/.
news.captureArticleHint: Save a full LLM article summary under Raw/Feeds/Articles/.
news.captureWatchedHint: Mark this as read/watched/listened — saves a stub under Raw/Feeds/Youtube/.
news.captureCustomHint: Run an LLM agent NOW with a free-form instruction (1–2 lines). The agent reads the article and applies your instruction with vault.* tools (write to TODO.md, append to a wiki page, save the link in a file you name, …).
news.captureCustomLabel: What should the agent do with this article? Examples: "save the link in TODO.md under Pro", "append a paragraph about this to Wiki/Tech/AI-ML/Mistral.md", "create a Notes/Cooking/ note from this recipe". 1–2 lines.
news.captureCustomPlaceholder: Tell the agent what to do…

chat.empty: Start a conversation. Your second brain has access to your tools.

wiki.title: Wiki
wiki.lockBusy: Another session is editing this note.
wiki.lockError: Could not acquire the edit lock.
wiki.chatAboutPageHint: Open a chat session pinned to this Wiki page — the LLM can vault.read it on demand.
wiki.selectionChatHint: Ask anything about the highlighted excerpt. The agent has the full vault.* toolset (read / find / grep / edit / etc.).
wiki.selectionChatPlaceholder: Ask the agent about the excerpt…

review.title: Wiki review
review.dueToday: No review done today — click to start one.

training.modalLead: The brain will generate a fiche on the concept:
training.useWebSearch: Use web search (if the provider supports it)

dashboard.title: Training
dashboard.subtitle: Your active themes and the fiches you've drilled into.
dashboard.empty: No training theme yet. Start a new one to seed an Index.md.

kickoff.title: Start a new training theme
kickoff.lead: Describe the theme you want to learn. The brain will ask you a few clarifying questions, then write your expectations and the Index.md overview.
kickoff.subjectPlaceholder: e.g. Kubernetes networking, Renaissance painting, distributed consensus…
kickoff.startHint: Pressing Start opens a short Q&A — answer in a few short lines.
kickoff.forceFinalizeHint: Skip remaining questions — the brain commits with what it has.
kickoff.generatingHint: Writing Expectations.md and the theme Index.md. This takes 30–60s.
kickoff.doneLead: The Index.md has been generated and committed. You can drill down from there at any time.
